response.justification: Although Bogdan has a strong background in software craftsmanship, distributed systems, and technical mentoring, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ experience, possessing less than a year of professional C++ usage. Additionally, his experience leans heavily toward full-stack web and application development rather than the low-level cloud compute platforms and hardware architecture required for this role.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentoring experience, including organizing workshops, coding dojos, and holding Staff Engineer titles.
Experience building high-throughput distributed systems and microservices, such as handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, engineering best practices, TDD, and CI/CD.
concerns: Severely lacks the minimum 8 years of C++ programming experience required, with his tech stack mostly focused on Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang.
Experience is predominantly in full-stack and web application development rather than core cloud compute infrastructure or hardware architecture.
Limited evidence of managing or architecting large-scale, low-level compute technologies or storage systems at the platform level.
